title: No more editing a Pulse Name "banner"?
excerpt:
All of a sudden, I can’t edit a pulse’s name in card view. I can get the dotted frame, I can highlight text, but if I need to change something I have to close it and get the pencil to edit inline. 
Annoying and not easy …

posts.author: ReadingTub (Terry Doherty)
posts.cookedHtml:
All of a sudden, I can’t edit a pulse’s name in card view. I can get the dotted frame, I can highlight text, but if I need to change something I have to close it and get the pencil to edit inline.

Annoying and not easy when titles are longer than the screen space.

Annotation 2020-03-27 095039751×544 31.6 KB

posts.author: Marko (Marko Petrović)
posts.cookedHtml: Same thing happened to me in Table view, i cant edit when i “open” the pulse just with pencil in main database view. I guess its some kind of bug, hope they fix it soon.
